---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

### Problem

What are you trying to do, and what's getting in the way today?

### Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. UI sketches / API shapes welcome.

### Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.

### Scope

- Component(s): <!-- Go API / Python daemon / client / admin -->
- Does this touch billing, auth, or the secret boundary? <!-- yes/no -->
